hero.headline: Meet Ansar Mahmood
hero.description: Global HSE Leader. Certified Trainer. Systems Architect. AI Innovation Specialist. Over 20 years of transforming safety cultures and enabling digital excellence across 10 countries.

intro.subheading: Trusted by Corporations. Respected by Professionals. Driven by Purpose.
paragraphs: With over 20 years of hands-on experience across 10 countries, Ansar Mahmood is one of the most versatile and forward-thinking Health, Safety, Environment, and Quality professionals of his generation. His work spans oil & gas megaprojects in the Middle East, manufacturing plants in Southeast Asia, construction programs in Europe, and digital transformation initiatives for multinational corporations worldwide.

What began as a frontline HSE officer role in the energy sector evolved into a distinguished career spanning strategic consulting, professional training and certification coaching, management system design, and — most recently — AI integration and digital HSE transformation.

He holds multiple professional qualifications including IOSH, ISO Lead Auditor credentials, and has developed deep expertise in Power BI, SharePoint, Power Apps, and AI platforms. This combination makes him uniquely positioned to bridge the gap between safety management and technology — a capability his clients describe as invaluable.

Above all, Ansar is a teacher. Whether coaching a candidate through certification exams or guiding an executive team through a board-level safety transformation, his ability to communicate complex concepts with clarity and conviction has earned him a reputation as one of the most respected HSE educators in the world.

philosophy.text: Safety is not a department. It is the foundation of every successful, sustainable business — and I am here to help you build that foundation right.

timeline.title: Foundation in Field HSE — Oil & Gas Sector
timeline.description: Began career as a frontline HSE officer in the energy sector, gaining deep hands-on experience in permit-to-work systems, risk assessment, emergency response, and operational safety management in high-hazard environments.

timeline.title: Professional Certification & International Deployment
timeline.description: Earned IOSH, and ISO Lead Auditor qualifications. Began deploying across multiple countries and sectors — construction, manufacturing, healthcare, and logistics — building cross-industry safety leadership capability.

timeline.title: Senior HSE Consultant & Management System Architect
timeline.description: Transitioned into strategic advisory, leading ISO 45001, ISO 14001, and integrated management system implementations for multinational corporations. Delivered 100+ audits, investigations, and safety culture transformation programs across 4 continents.

timeline.title: Certified Trainer & Examination Coach
timeline.description: Established a reputation as one of the most effective IOSH and certification trainers in the region, with candidates consistently achieving first-attempt pass rates above 97%. Developed custom corporate training programs for global energy companies.

timeline.title: Power BI, SharePoint & Digital HSE Systems
timeline.description: Pioneered digital HSE transformation, building Power BI safety dashboards, SharePoint HSE portals, and Power Apps inspection tools. Became a sought-after advisor for organisations looking to modernise their safety management with digital-first solutions.

timeline.title: AI Solutions & Future-Ready HSE Consulting
timeline.description: Now at the forefront of AI-powered safety management — deploying custom AI agents, predictive analytics models, automated compliance tools, and intelligent reporting systems that give organisations a genuine competitive advantage in safety performance.
